    Finds or creates an instrument entry for the given security.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Optional<GTNetInstrumentSecurity>
    GTNetInstrumentSecurityJpaRepository.findByIsinAndCurrency(String isin, String currency)
    Finds a security instrument by its ISIN and currency.
    List<GTNetInstrumentSecurity>
    GTNetInstrumentSecurityJpaRepository.findByIsinCurrencyKeys(List<String> keys)
    Finds security instruments by a list of composite keys (ISIN|currency format).
    List<GTNetInstrumentSecurity>
    GTNetInstrumentSecurityJpaRepositoryCustom.findByIsinCurrencyTuples(List<String[]> isinCurrencyPairs)
    Queries security instruments from the pool by batch of ISIN+currency tuples.
    List<GTNetInstrumentSecurity>
    GTNetInstrumentSecurityJpaRepositoryImpl.findByIsinCurrencyTuples(List<String[]> isinCurrencyPairs)
     
    List<GTNetInstrumentSecurity>
    GTNetInstrumentSecurityJpaRepository.findForeignInstruments()
    Finds all foreign security instruments (those that do NOT exist in the local database).
    List<GTNetInstrumentSecurity>
    GTNetInstrumentSecurityJpaRepository.findLocalInstruments()
    Finds all local security instruments (those that exist in the local database).
